executives.name: Carrie Palin
executives.background: Carrie Palin has been a member of our Board since February 2021. She is currently the Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Cisco Systems, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer

executives.name: Godfrey Sullivan
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Splunk Inc. Former President and CEO of Hyperion Solutions Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors / Non-Executive Chairman

executives.name: Jason Child
executives.background: Jason Child has served as our Chief Financial Officer since November 2022. Prior to joining Arm, Mr. Child served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Splunk Inc. from 2019 to 2022. He has also held CFO roles at Opendoor, Jawbone, and Groupon, and spent over 11 years at Amazon in various financial leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

board_of_directors.name: Godfrey Sullivan
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Splunk Inc. Former President and CEO of Hyperion Solutions Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors / Non-Executive Chairman
